sentences.target: Le camion bloque l'entrée du parking.

translations.fr: Le camion bloque l'entrée du parking.
translations.en: The truck is blocking the parking entrance.
translations.es: El camión está bloqueando la entrada del estacionamiento.
translations.de: Der Lkw blockiert die Einfahrt zum Parkplatz.
translations.it: Il camion sta bloccando l'ingresso del parcheggio.
translations.zh-Hans: 卡车挡住了停车场入口。
translations.pt: O caminhão está bloqueando a entrada do estacionamento.
translations.vi: Chiếc xe tải đang chặn lối vào bãi đỗ xe.
translations.nl: De vrachtwagen blokkeert de ingang van de parkeerplaats.
translations.hu: A teherautó elzárja a parkoló bejáratát.
translations.hi: ट्रक पार्किंग के प्रवेश द्वार को रोक रहा है.
translations.el: Το φορτηγό μπλοκάρει την είσοδο του πάρκινγκ.
translations.id: Truk itu menghalangi pintu masuk tempat parkir.
translations.cs: Nákladní auto blokuje vjezd na parkoviště.
translations.ja: トラックが駐車場の入口をふさいでいます.

tokens.explanation: Definite article introducing the masculine singular noun 'camion'; marks definiteness of the subject NP.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject NP.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; transitive, agrees with 'Le camion'.
Noun functioning as the direct object; preceded by elided definite article 'l'' attached to the noun.
Preposition 'de' contracted with article 'le' (du); introduces the nominal complement 'parking' (genitive/possessive relation).
Loanword noun; head of the prepositional complement of 'du', specifying which entrance.

sentences.target: Je suis derrière le camion rouge.

translations.fr: Je suis derrière le camion rouge.
translations.de: Ich bin hinter dem roten Lkw.
translations.vi: Tôi ở phía sau chiếc xe tải màu đỏ.
translations.nl: Ik sta achter de rode vrachtwagen.
translations.hi: मैं लाल ट्रक के पीछे हूँ.
translations.el: Είμαι πίσω από το κόκκινο φορτηγό.
translations.nb: Jeg står bak den røde lastebilen.
translations.id: Saya berada di belakang truk merah.
translations.sv: Jag står bakom den röda lastbilen.
translations.da: Jeg står bag den røde lastbil.
translations.ja: 私は赤いトラックの後ろにいます.

tokens.explanation: First-person singular subject pronoun.
Present indicative 1st person singular of 'être' used as a copula linking the subject to the locative PP.
Preposition introducing the NP complement 'le camion rouge'.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing 'camion'.
Common noun; head of the NP complement of 'derrière'.
Adjective modifying 'camion'; postnominal; agrees in gender/number with the noun (masculine singular here).

translations.en: The truck is passing in front of us.
translations.es: El camión pasa delante de nosotros.
translations.de: Der Lkw fährt vor uns vorbei.
translations.it: Il camion passa davanti a noi.
translations.pt: O caminhão passa à nossa frente.
translations.vi: Chiếc xe tải đi qua trước mặt chúng tôi.
translations.nl: De vrachtwagen rijdt voor ons langs.
translations.hi: ट्रक हमारे सामने से गुजर रहा है.
translations.id: Truk itu melintas di depan kami.
translations.ja: トラックが私たちの前を通り過ぎています.

tokens.explanation: Definite article introducing the subject noun 'camion'.
Common noun; head of the subject NP.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; intransitive motion verb here.
Preposition introducing the complement 'nous'.
Personal pronoun in tonic form; object of the preposition 'devant'.

sentences.target: On suit le camion jusqu'au rond-point.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ sɥi lə kamjɔ̃ ʒysko ʁɔ̃ pwɛ̃/

translations.fr: On suit le camion jusqu'au rond-point.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ sɥi lə kamjɔ̃ ʒysko ʁɔ̃ pwɛ̃/
translations.en: We follow the truck to the roundabout.
translations.es: Seguimos al camión hasta la rotonda.
translations.de: Wir folgen dem Lkw bis zum Kreisverkehr.
translations.it: Seguiamo il camion fino alla rotonda.
translations.yue: 我哋跟住架貨車去到迴旋處。
translations.ru: Мы следуем за грузовиком до круговой развязки.
translations.pt: Seguimos o caminhão até a rotatória.
translations.he: אנחנו עוקבים אחרי המשאית עד הכיכר.
translations.tr: Kamyonu döner kavşağa kadar takip ediyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi theo chiếc xe tải đến vòng xuyến.
translations.nl: We volgen de vrachtwagen tot aan de rotonde.
translations.uk: Ми слідуємо за вантажівкою до кільцевої розв'язки.
translations.hi: हम ट्रक के पीछे-पीछे गोल चक्कर तक जाते हैं.
translations.pl: Jedziemy za ciężarówką aż do ronda.
translations.el: Ακολουθούμε το φορτηγό μέχρι τον κυκλικό κόμβο.
translations.id: Kami mengikuti truk itu sampai bundaran.
translations.ro: Urmăm camionul până la sensul giratoriu.
translations.cs: Sledujeme nákladní auto až ke kruhovému objezdu.
translations.da: Vi følger lastbilen hen til rundkørslen.
translations.ja: 私たちはトラックの後について環状交差点まで行きます.

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/colloquial subject pronoun; takes 3rd person singular agreement.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; transitive, agrees with 'On'.
Definite article introducing the direct object 'camion'.
Common noun; direct object of 'suit'.
Complex preposition 'jusqu'à' contracted with 'au' (à+le); marks a limit ('up to the').
Hyphenated compound noun; complement of the preposition 'jusqu'au'.
